meaning: n.东方三博士(即寻访初生基督的三博士)n.pl.古波斯祭司名(Magus的复数)
examples: The Magi, Brahmins, and Druids were bracketed together as men of wisdom.
The other two magi (and their camels) eye him skeptically.
I still carried my green net but I began to play at being a sage, a magi- cian or a poet.
Magi Bish couldn't get the man in the white car out of her mind.
John and Magi Bish slowly began to realize that Molly must have been abducted.
